title: Evidence
description: A proof of mastery produced by the learner. Evidence is what the system collects to determine whether a skill is acquired and a checkpoint is passed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the evidence record.

type.description: What form the evidence takes. command_output = terminal output, file_artifact = a file the learner produced, explanation = learner's own words, test_result = automated test pass, peer_feedback = another learner's review.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the evidence shows.

expected_content.description: What the evidence should contain or demonstrate to be valid.
